problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
